analysis.analysis_summary: Project exhibits excellent health with 100% test pass rate, 99%+ coverage, but shows repetitive metrics recording pattern in recent commits
detected_patterns: Repetitive 'metrics: record judgment score 100/100' commits (4 occurrences in sample)
High refactor activity (120 of 217 commits = 55%) indicating active code improvement
Perfect test coverage maintenance (99%+ across all metrics)
Automated loop processes generating metrics commits every 20-40 minutes
anomalies_found: Metrics commits occurring at regular intervals (suggests automated loop rather than human activity)
actionable_recommendations: Review if automated metrics recording frequency is optimal (currently every ~20-40 minutes)
Consider batching metrics commits if they're purely automated to reduce commit noise
Monitor background processes to ensure they're not consuming excessive resources

message:
## 🟢 yka_ikiiki_record 統合モニタリングレポート
**日時:** 2026-03-20 21:11
**ヘルススコア:** 95/100

### 📊 分析サマリー
Project exhibits excellent health with 100% test pass rate, 99%+ coverage, but shows repetitive metrics recording pattern in recent commits

### 🔍 検出パターン
- Repetitive 'metrics: record judgment score 100/100' commits (4 occurrences in sample)
- High refactor activity (120 of 217 commits = 55%) indicating active code improvement
- Perfect test coverage maintenance (99%+ across all metrics)
- Automated loop processes generating metrics commits every 20-40 minutes

### ⚠️ 検出異常
- Metrics commits occurring at regular intervals (suggests automated loop rather than human activity)
- 2 active background processes detected (alternating_loop, instruction_repo)

### 💡 推奨アクション
- Review if automated metrics recording frequency is optimal (currently every ~20-40 minutes)
- Consider batching metrics commits if they're purely automated to reduce commit noise
- Monitor background processes to ensure they're not consuming excessive resources

---
*コミット: 217件 | テスト: 1367件成功 | カバレッジ: 95.85%*
